title: Garlicky Steam Roasted Portuguese Turkey Paella
description: A flavorful portuguese-inspired paella with turkey neck, vegetables, and a hint of garlic.
instructions: Heat the iron teppan over medium-high heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil and swirl it around.
Sear the turkey neck until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the turkey neck and set it aside.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, smoked paprika, safron threads, and garlic. Bring to a boil.
Add the browned turkey neck back into the pan.
Reduce heat to low and cover the pan with a lid.
Steam roast the paella for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
